tasks.label: Build mmayer_tech.tex and copy PDF
args: Set-Location -LiteralPath '${workspaceFolder}\Roel_Junior_Alejo_Viernes___CV - Tech'; latexmk -pdf -interaction=nonstopmode mmayer_tech.tex; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path '${workspaceFolder}\built-pdfs' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -LiteralPath 'mmayer_tech.pdf' -Destination '${workspaceFolder}\built-pdfs\mmayer_tech.pdf' -Force } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
